task: Advanced high-value task: Llm Code-Agent Trace Analysis Verification Coverage Addendum. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for llm code-agent trace analysis. Embedded packet: Records: R1 failure_count=29 pass_with_tests_pct=51 pass_without_tests_pct=8; R2 failure_count=38 pass_with_tests_pct=47 pass_without_tests_pct=11; R3 failure_count=24 pass_with_tests_pct=62 pass_without_tests_pct=7. Remediation options: O1 changes failure_count by -12% cost=71000; O2 changes pass_with_tests_pct by -18% cost=90600; O3 changes pass_without_tests_pct by -25% cost=51400; max_budget=115200. Rules and constraints: count>15 and pass-rate delta>20 points requires rubric change; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver agent_eval_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
